verdict.answer_first: B states the recommendation earlier: "Recommended default: Server-Sent Events (SSE) for in-app, Web Push for background"; A opens with generic caveat and a menu before deciding.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits cleaner to one default: "SSE is the right default"; A weakens itself with a four-row transport survey before the recommendation.
verdict.fabrication: A invents/overstates: "there's no web app in this directory" and "covers ~90%"; B has no clear fabricated number.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on because the sequence is tight: "The plan, in order" with store, delivery, client, edge cases; A has useful detail but too much option-table sprawl.
